introSection: Wild Mouse is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Lagoon in Farmington, Utah, USA. The ride is similar to the former wooden wild mouse coaster that was located at the park years earlier.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
In December 1997, Lagoon announced the addition of Wild Mouse.

Wild Mouse opened on April 10, 1998.

The track was repainted green for the 2013 season. It was previously painted pink when it first opened.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single car trains. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 4 riders per car.

fullText:
Wild Mouse is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Lagoon in Farmington, Utah, USA. The ride is similar to the former wooden wild mouse coaster that was located at the park years earlier.

In December 1997, Lagoon announced the addition of Wild Mouse.

Wild Mouse opened on April 10, 1998.

The track was repainted green for the 2013 season. It was previously painted pink when it first opened.



Single car trains. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 4 riders per car.
